name: Ham'n Swiss Croissants
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a saucepan.
2. Sauté mushrooms and onions until tender and mushroom liquid has evaporated.
3. Blend in flour. Gradually stir in milk. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Add salt and pepper to taste.
4. On the bottom half of each croissant, layer 2 slices of ham, one quarter of the cheese, and one quarter of the mushroom sauce.
5. Replace the top of the croissant.
6. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F (180°C) for about 15 minutes or until heated through.
